meaning: n.哈弗尔河(位于德国东北部)
examples: We're all waiting for Havel to say something fundamental.
I tried to picture the moment when Dubcek and Havel appeared before the crowd.
A few days later, Vclav Havel came to Washington for a state visit, telling the press I was his great friend.
Despite the difficulties surrounding the election, neither analyst said Mr Havel's retirement was an insurmountable obstacle.
And Mr Havel, however eloquent his pleas for discussion and consensus, has failed to displace it.
